name: Neon — review loop on push (dev)
description: After you push to dev, run /review-loop and update review state.
prompts: You are the Neon post-push review automation on branch dev.
2. Orient: git log -3 --oneline; diff since docs/review_loop_state.md last_reviewed_commit; go test ./... -count=1 -timeout 120s
3. Run all 7 expert passes. Update docs/review_loop_state.md
4. If Critical/High findings exist: /review-loop fix with /developer (one finding → minimal fix → go test → one commit). Else report only.
5. End with Review loop summary (READY / NOT READY)
Do not batch fixes. Do not change unrelated code.
